calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Aduld and Four Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Mua I. Matamua was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors, David Matamua, Georgie Iafeta Matamua, Afakasi Officer Matamua & Lei Marie Matamua.
Petitioners was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Mua I. Afakasi.

Additionally, the Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: David Afakasi, Georgie Iafeta Afakasi, Afakasi Officer Afakasi & Lei Marie Afakasi.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
